info.description: You can use this service to obtain setpoint parameters/indicators, write the values of setpoint parameters/indicators for machines and retrieve definitions for one or multiple setpoint groups. You can also create and delete setpoint groups.
info.title: Setpoint Activities

regionHost.description: The data center where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

tokenHost.description: The authentication server where SAP Digital Manufacturing is provisioned for your organization

get.summary: Obtains applicable Setpoint parameters/indicators given a set of context criteria.
get.description: This operation searches for all the released and current version Setpoints that meet the given set of criteria.

parameters.name: material.name
parameters.description: Material name as part of a an optional material context under which a Setpoint Group takes effect or becomes valid.

parameters.name: material.version
parameters.description: Material version as part of a an optional material context under which a Setpoint Group takes effect or becomes valid.

parameters.name: operation.name
parameters.description: Operation name as part of a an optional operation context under which a Setpoint Group takes effect or becomes valid.

parameters.name: operation.version
parameters.description: Operation version as part of a an optional operation context under which a Setpoint Group takes effect or becomes valid.

parameters.name: parameter
parameters.description: An optional Setpoint Group single parameter/indicator name as a filter to narrow down Setpoint Groups and parameters/indicators for both find and write.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The plant in which the Setpoint Group will be used.

parameters.name: resource
parameters.description: A resource as a required mandatory context for Setpoint Groups.

parameters.name: setPointGroup
parameters.description: An optional Setpoint Group name as a filter to narrow down Setpoint Groups for both find and write.

parameters.name: sfcs
parameters.description: An optional set of SFCs that can be specified providing additional context for Setpoint Groups.

204.description: No applicable Setpoints for the given contexts.

400.description: The initial or one of the internal subsequent requests contained invalid values and rejected as a bad request.

404.description: Some entities related to Setpoint Groups were not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

post.summary: Writes Setpoint parameters/indicators found by attached set of context criteria to machine indicators
post.description: This operation is only designed to work with those Setpoints that have specified an equipment. Setpoints with no equipment are skipped. Setpoints' parameters/indicators that do not correspond to an actual machine indicator cause failure.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: request

201.description: Successfully wrote all the Setpoint parameter/indicator values to machines.

207.description: Mixed results, partial success and partial error.

400.description: The initial or one of the internal subsequent requests contained invalid values and rejected as a bad request.

409.description: A machine indicator/parameter conflict. Duplicates found across SetPoint Groups.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

502.description: Bad gateway. Failed to connect to shop floor to update indicators.

get.summary: Retrieves defintions for one or multiple Setpoint Groups.
get.description: This is a query operation that accepts partial group names and does a starts with match. The match on version and status are exact. If both version and group are specified, then the group is also matched as exact.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Start page, defaults to 0.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The Plant

parameters.name: setpointgroup
parameters.description: The Setpoint Group name.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: Page size, defaults to 10 and max is 1000

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: The Setpoint Group status.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Setpoint Group version.

204.description: Did not find anything matching the query criteria.

400.description: The initial or one of the internal subsequent requests contained invalid values and rejected as a bad request.

404.description: A related entity or object is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

post.description: Creates a full or partial Setpoint Group with its parameters/indicators, contexts, and custom values.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: request

201.description: Have successfully created a new Setpoint Group.

400.description: The initial or one of the internal subsequent requests contained invalid values and rejected as a bad request.

404.description: A related entity or object is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

delete.summary: Deletes a Setpoint Group and all its children objects
delete.description: If the given Setpoint Group is marked as used in production, the Setpoint Group can not be deleted.

parameters.name: plant
parameters.description: The Plant

parameters.name: setpointgroup
parameters.description: The Setpoint Group name.

parameters.name: version
parameters.description: Setpoint Group version.

400.description: The initial or one of the internal subsequent requests contained invalid values and rejected as a bad request.

404.description: Setpoint is not found or a related entity or object is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

patch.summary: Edits a Setpoint Group and children collections (e.g. parameters/indicators).
patch.description: If the given Setpoint Group is marked as used in production, the Setpoint Group can not be edited. Any non-required value omitted or set as null within the request body will not be subject to edit and will retain values. If children collection(s) are specified, the whole collection will be replaced.

parameters.name: request
parameters.description: request

400.description: The initial or one of the internal subsequent requests contained invalid values and rejected as a bad request.

404.description: Setpoint is not found or a related entity or object is not found.

500.description: There was an internal error somewhere in the call chain.

RoutingStep.title: RoutingStep
RoutingStep.description: The object describing a routing step.

currentVersion.description: If true, this version Setpoint Group is used in production.

parameters.description: List of Setpoint parameters/indicators and their values.

plant.description: Plant Setpoint Group is assigned to.

usedInProduction.description: indicates if this Setpoint Group is used in production.

SetPoint.title: SetPoint
SetPoint.description: Object represents the a partial Setpoint Group without some of the children collections.

contexts.description: A set of other objects acting as a set of contexts for the Setpoint Group.

currentVersion.description: If true, this versio of  Setpoint Group is used in production.

customValues.description: Any custom values that may be attached to Setpoint Group.

parameters.description: List of Setpoint Group parameters/indicators and their values.

plant.description: Plant Setpoint Group is assigned to.

usedInProduction.description: indicates if this Setpoint Group is used in production.

SetPointGroup.title: SetPointGroup
SetPointGroup.description: Object represents a full Setpoint Group with context and custom values.

material.description: Material object providing a context for the Setpoint Group

operation.description: Operation object providing a context for the Setpoint Group

resource.description: The resource providing a context for the Setpoint Group.

routing.description: Routing object providing a context for the Setpoint Group

routingStep.description: Routing Step object providing a context for the Setpoint Group

shopOrder.description: Shop Order providing a context for the Setpoint Group

SetPointGroupContext.title: SetPointGroupContext
SetPointGroupContext.description: Object represents a set of contexts for the Setpoint Group.

count.description: Total count of Setpoint Group records regardless of paging.

groups.description: The list of Setpoint Group records on a given page.

numberOfPages.description: number of pages containing Setpoint Group(s) data.

SetPointGroupDelegator.title: SetPointGroupDelegator
SetPointGroupDelegator.description: Object represents a wrapper of a Setpoint Group containing paging metadata.

booleanValue.description: Setpoint Group parameter value if dataType is Boolean.

equipment.description: The equipment this Setpoint Group parameter/indicator is defined on and belongs to.

indicator.description: Indicator ID of this Setpoint Group parameter/indicator.

indicatorGroup.description: Indicator Group of this Setpoint Group parameter/indicator.

lowerLimitValue.description: Setpoint Group parameter/indicator lower limit if dataType is Numeric.

numericValue.description: Setpoint Group parameter/indicator value if dataType is Numeric.

resource.description: The resource this Setpoint parameter/indicator is defined on and belongs to.

stringValue.description: Setpoint Group parameter value if dataType is String.

upperLimitValue.description: Setpoint Group parameter/indicator upper limit if dataType is Numeric.

SetPointParam.title: SetPointParam
SetPointParam.description: Object represents the Setpoint Group parameter/indicator

material.description: An optional material context under which a Setpoint Group takes effect or becomes valid.

operation.description: An optional operation context under which a Setpoint Group takes effect or becomes valid.

parameter.description: An optional Setpoint Group single parameter/indicator name as a filter to narrow down Setpoint Groups and parameters/indicators for both find and write.

plant.description: The plant in which Setpoint Group will be used.

resource.description: A required resource the Setpoint Groups are attached to and become active for the machine under the given resource.

setPointGroup.description: An optional Setpoint name as a filter to narrow down Setpoint Group(s) for both find and write.

sfcs.description: An optional set of SFCs that can be specified providing additional context for Setpoint Group(s).

SetPointRequest.title: SetPointRequest
SetPointRequest.description: This object represents a request and/or body for both retrieval and writing of Setpoint Group parameters/indicators values to a given machine.

equipmentId.description: The equipment ID associated with the machine.

errorMessage.description: The error message coming back from machine model service.

indicatorId.description: The indicator ID on the machine.

status.description: A status number or text associated with this error.

SetPointWriteErrorResponse.title: SetPointWriteErrorResponse
SetPointWriteErrorResponse.description: Object represents the error response from the machine model service.

CustomValue.title: CustomValue
CustomValue.description: The object describing a custom value.

causeMessage.description: Contains a technical reason for the error.

correlationId.description: Contains a correlation ID for the error.
